name: Sakyong Mipham
bio: Sakyong Mipham Rinpoche is the son of Chögyam Trungpa Rinpoche and head of the Shambhala lineage. He is the author of 'Turning the Mind into an Ally' and 'Running with the Mind of Meditation.' He leads the Shambhala community, which integrates Tibetan Buddhist practice with the Shambhala warrior tradition. He has taught extensively on meditation and secular approaches to cultivating human goodness.
